chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP D 573 2025 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3383/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1, 2, 16 & 34. 3. For orders on CMA No.3039/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 20.02.2025 Mr. Sajan, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Umar Panhwer, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Serious office objections have been raised. Upon being confronted, counsel remains unable to assist and merely seeks time. In view of office objections, this petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
